chunks.text: BWRC Community Celebrates Major Honors at ISSCC | Berkeley Wireless Research Center Skip to main content BWRC Community Celebrates Major Honors at ISSCC February 17, 2026 The Berkeley Wireless Research Center community had an outstanding showing at t

h Center community had an outstanding showing at this year’s awards ceremony connected to the IEEE International Solid-State Circuits Conference and broader IEEE Solid-State Circuits community. 2026 IEEE Donald O. Pederson Award in Solid-State Circui

EEE Donald O. Pederson Award in Solid-State Circuits Congratulations to Jan Rabaey for receiving this prestigious honor recognizing outstanding contributions to solid-state circuits. IEEE Journal of Solid-State Circuits – Best Student Paper Award 202

olid-State Circuits – Best Student Paper Award 2024 Presented by the IEEE Journal of Solid-State Circuits for the paper: “A Wireless, Multicolor Fluorescence Image Sensor Implant for Real-Time Monitoring in Cancer Therapy” Awardees: Micah Roschelle ,

ing in Cancer Therapy” Awardees: Micah Roschelle , Rozhan Rabbani , Surin Gweon , Rohan Kumar , Alec Vercruysse , Nam Woo Cho , Matthew H. Spitzer , Ali M. Niknejad , Vladimir M. Stojanovic , and Mekhail Anwar . 2025 IEEE Solid-State Circuits Society

ail Anwar . 2025 IEEE Solid-State Circuits Society Test of Time Award Presented by the IEEE Solid-State Circuits Society to: Anantha P. Chandrakasan , Sam Sheng , and Robert W. Brodersen For their seminal work: “Low-power CMOS digital design.” 2025 I

inal work: “Low-power CMOS digital design.” 2025 ISSCC Forum Presenter Award Congratulations to Marian Verhelst . IEEE Fellow Elevations Special congratulations to Tom Burd , Ada Poon, Farhana Sheikh , and Zhengya Zhang on being elevated to IEEE Fell
, and Zhengya Zhang on being elevated to IEEE Fellow . These honors reflect the exceptional innovation, collaboration, and impact of the BWRC community. Congratulations to all awardees!
